text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
G-good morning! About yesterday, um... I'm so sorry for my
ineptitude! Today, I'll d-do better!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: About that, actually. I have a suggestion, if I may?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Um, Rob Roy, you had a lot on your shoulders yesterday, didn't you?
You made the plans, lead the way, explained everything, told us what
to do...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
So, if it'll help, should I give the instructions? If you tell me what
needs to be done, I can take it from there.

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
Oh, gosh... Well, thank you. I think it would be safer to do it that way
too.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Just relax and leave it to me. I'm actually, well... If there's one thing
I'm good at, it's worrying about things.

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Okay! I've noted down the switch's location and taken a picture! Let's
go back and show everyone!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
You and me'll find the second switch, while Dober's group retries the
Lonely River!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: It's a carefully thought-out plan. Hehe. That's so Dober!

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
Yes. To be honest, I'm also quite relieved. Oh, sorry. The way back
is... this way?

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
(What a predicament. I could find out for sure if I checked the book,
but... I can't just take it out here...)

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text: Uhhh, it's this way!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Okay! Right behind you!

text_block_list.name: Rob Roy & Taiki
text_block_list.text:
Ahhh!
Nooo!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
O-ouch! Who knew there were random cliffs in the forest?! I don't see
any way of climbing back up from here.

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
I'll message everyone on LANE. "Help me!"
Oh, Rob Roy, you don't look very well!

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
I'm sorry! So sorry! If... if I'd just told the truth, I could've checked the
route in the book!

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
A-and yesterday too, if I'd told the truth, we could've checked the
book first and avoided that whole fiasco!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Hey, Rob Roy, calm down! What's all this about? Take your time,
okay? Tell me what happened, nice and slow.

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text: The truth is... that story isn't from a movie, it's from a children's book. Rhodonite and the Dreamstone, it's called.

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: A book?

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
If only I'd told the truth sooner, we could've avoided a lot of trouble.
I'm sorry.

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
I knew it all sounded familiar! You mean it's from that book? The
Lonely River, Ghillie Dhu's Garden, the Dreamstone...

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text: ...What?! Y-you mean you've read the book too?

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Yeah! When I was little, my friends used to love it! We would all read
it together!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Oh, b-but wait a minute! Does that mean we've been exploring that world this whole time?!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: And I got lots of pictures of it all! Haha!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Now that I know, this looks exactly like the Lonely River that I'd
imagined! The undine's spring too, and the forest, the animals...

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
The Tree Man, the red mushroom, they were all in the story! If I
remember correctly, near the red mushroom was a cat wearing shoes!

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
Th-that's right! There was a meeting with the cat-sìths! That's where
they asked the villagers to drive away the kelpies!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Ahaha! Yeah, I remember! And then, the cat-sìths invite them into
their kingdom, and they say—

text_block_list.name: Rob Roy & Taiki
text_block_list.text: "Tokubetsu ni shoutai shiyou. Juppondo de ii." "Just for you, ten pounds and you're in!"

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Haha! So that's how the line goes in Japanese!

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
I can't believe it! I never imagined we'd have so much fun talking
about books together!

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text: ...But of course. Books truly are amazing.

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
(What made me think they were childish? They transcend borders and
time, bringing people together!)

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Oh, there they are! Heeey! You okay, you two?

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Man, you sure did give me a shock. Your "Help me!" was so sudden.
Oh, the other two are still looking for you. I'll let them know.

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Thank you! You found us so quickly!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
That's because I thought I saw a fairy dressed in black over here.
When I followed it, I found you guys!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
I might just be imagining things, but there's so many mysteries to this
place, it's really fun!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Someone normal like me never could've found a place like this! Man, I
hope I get to watch the movie someday!

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text: Ah! Um, about that...

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: What? So it wasn't a movie, it was a book?

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
...I-it's a little embarrassing, but... well, I thought a movie would
sound more mature, so...

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Hm. So basically, you want to be more mature?

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text: Huh? Uh, not exactly... It's just...

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
N-none of my classmates are into children's literature like I am.
There's one who knows a lot about cosmetics, and everyone's
interested in that kind of stuff...

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text: So I kind of started to feel embarrassed about liking books...

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
It's not that they're mature, they're just into makeup. And it's not that
you're childish, you're just into books. Don't you think?

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text: ...What?

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
And you know what, they're both unique and amazing in their own
way. I mean...

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
As someone who's never really gotten deep into reading, makeup, or
any kind of hobby, they're both equally amazing to me!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
I definitely never would've seen the campsite map and thought, "This
is just like that story! A-ha!" on my own, you know?

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: So, um... yeah! You're fine as you are! Right, Taiki?

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Yep! You're A-OK!

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text: I'm fine... as I am?

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text: Oh... I'd... never thought of it that way...
